nativePolicy: React Aria owns the menu collection, portal anchoring and collision, typeahead, dismissal, Escape, and focus return.
The shared LayerManager records the active menu as non-dismissible and does not install a competing Escape handler.
The nearest MergoraProvider locale supplies React Aria collation and typeahead; public start/end placement maps to physical edges from the independently resolved Direction.
Item ids are non-empty unique collection keys; generated index-based description ids remain valid IDREF tokens even when consumer keys contain spaces.
Destructive actions require a second activation with explicit confirmation text.
